MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

David Cook, Esq., Law office of, (415) 989-4730, for Petitioner.

No other appearances in this matter.

RE: Plaintiff's MOTION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT.

Not argued/contested. The court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's unopposed "application for issuance of writ of attachment - after hearing pursuant to CCP 484.010 et seq." is granted.
